creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
Changelog:

- Use secure -P option handling

  Submitted by: Andrzej Tobola

- Do not force --host, --user, --password variables onto MySQL programs if they
  was not set from command line (allow use from ~/.my.cnf)

  Submitted by: Andrzej Tobola

- Fix problem with -P option handling (a `bad number' error)
